title: Scottish Cod and Chips
description: A traditional Scottish dish consisting of battered and fried cod served with crispy chips (fries).
instructions: Heat the oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (175°C).
In a shallow dish, mix together the flour and a pinch of salt.
In a separate dish, beat the eggs.
Dip each cod fillet first in the flour mixture, then in the beaten eggs.
Place the coated cod in the hot oil and fry for 3-4 minutes or until golden brown.
Remove the cod from the oil and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Fry the chips in batches until golden brown and crispy.
Drain the chips on paper towels.
Serve the cod with chips and a dollop of melted butter.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
